name: insight-card
title: AI Insight Card
description: AI insight tile surfaced in the Copilot drawer's AI Insights tab: a severity-keyed left rail, an uppercase kind tag with a right-aligned confidence%, a title, a description, a sample sparkline (inline SVG that inherits the severity colour), and an action row composing the insight-btn classes (Add as widget / Investigate / Dismiss). The Dismiss button fades and removes its own card.
